item.title: GP Partnership Appeal Slumps, Survey Finds
item.description: Most GPs back the partnership model, but fewer than a third say they are likely to take on the role, RCGP survey data show. Medscape News UK

item.title: Tirzepatide Now Available in Multi-Dose KwikPen
item.description: Patients who pay cash can get the multi-dose KwikPen device on LillyDirect, with prices starting at $299 for the lowest dose. Medscape Medical News

item.title: FDA OKs Milsaperidone for Bipolar I Disorder, Schizophrenia
item.description: Milsaperidone, a new chemical entity, is the major active metabolite of iloperidone (Fanapt) and had been demonstrated to be bioequivalent to iloperid...

item.title: Obefazimod Improves Quality of Life in Ulcerative Colitis
item.description: Patients with moderate-to-severe ulcerative colitis treated with once-daily, oral obefazimod reported clinically meaningful improvements in overall qu...

item.title: Gossamer Bio Shares Plummet as Lung Disease Drug Fails Late-stage Trial
item.description: Gossamer Bio's experimental treatment failed to significantly improve exercise capacity in patients with a rare ⁠lung condition in a late-stage study,...
